channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Defections from Google DeepMind raise questions about Alphabet's AI leadership
item.description: As Google's AI models lose leaderboard positions and release pace slows, doubts grow about its ability to stay at the forefront.

item.title: 47% of Harvard seniors admit to cheating, a problem that predates ChatGPT
item.description: Researchers spoke with first-year college students about using artificial intelligence, revealing longstanding issues.

item.title: U.S. cancer deaths down 34% since 1991, but not in 458 rural counties
item.description: The richest counties improved seven times faster than the poorest. Cancer mortality is rising in rural areas.

item.title: The inventor of the Fed's magic trick has died. His successor is preparing to try it again.
item.description: Alan Greenspan's close associates see his influence in the AI gamble, hoping it will not end similarly.
